overview: Frost Skeleton Crossbowman is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 25 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 180% ratio (450 base damage). Sight range 1100, combat radius 700. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1100 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1100 units, loses target at 1600 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 700, ability check distance 800
strategies.description: Combat area radius 700. Ability check distance 800.

strategies.title: Flee/Kite Behavior
strategies.description: flees when target within 900 units. re-engages at 500 unit peace distance.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1100 units. Loses target at 1600 units.
